_metadata.notes: This visa is for leaders or potential leaders in academia, research, digital technology, arts and culture, or other eligible fields.

endorsement.description: Applicant must have endorsement from a designated competent body
endorsement.details: You must obtain endorsement from a designated competent body before applying for the visa. The endorsing body depends on your field.

eligible_field.description: Applicant must work in an eligible field (academia, research, digital technology, arts)
eligible_field.details: Your work must fall within one of the eligible fields: Academia/Research, Digital Technology, or Arts and Culture.

exceptional_criteria.description: Applicant must demonstrate exceptional talent or exceptional promise
exceptional_criteria.details: You must demonstrate either exceptional promise (emerging leader) or exceptional talent (recognised world leader) in your field.

academia_research.name: Academia or Research
academia_research.description: For researchers, academics, and scientists working in universities, research institutions, or industry research.

digital_technology.name: Digital Technology
digital_technology.description: For professionals working in software development, AI, cybersecurity, fintech, and other digital technology fields.

arts_culture.name: Arts and Culture
arts_culture.description: For artists, musicians, writers, actors, directors, and other creative professionals.

fees.note: Endorsement application fee is separate from visa application fee

settlement.description: Global Talent visa holders can apply for Indefinite Leave to Remain (ILR) after 5 years in the UK, or after 3 years if endorsed for exceptional talent.
